calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Philip Kilduff, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant.
Principal of $34,799.00
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $229.84
Interest of $4,496.22. For the total of $40,185.06.
Judgment signed in open court.
